description: La Línea is the leading faction of the Juárez Cartel, originally formed as an enforcer unit by former and active-duty policemen. Based in Ciudad Juárez, Mexico, it has been active since 2008, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and murder. The gang has been linked to several high-profile massacres and has formed alliances with other cartels, including the Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

country_links.evidence_quote: In the early 2010s the DEA estimated that about 70% of the cocaine that enters the United States flows through the El Paso–Juárez border.
country_links.context: La Línea routes cocaine through the El Paso–Juárez border into the United States.
